title: Fallthrough & Friends
description: Kris Brandow and Matthew Sanabria from the Fallthrough podcast join Jerod to discuss tools worth changing to in 2025, whether Go remains compelling as a systems language, AI-generated source code as bytecode, user-centric documentation models, and the case for corporate archivists.
